title: ThaiBev Is Said to Consider Selling KFC Franchise Business

title: Latest Oil Market News and Analysis for July 17
summary: Oil headed for its biggest weekly advance since April as the escalating conflict between the US and Iran disrupted supply from the Middle East.

title: US Corporate Insiders Are Selling Stocks at a Near Record Pace
summary: US executives are selling shares at the second-fastest pace in more than 20 years, a classic red flag to some investors because it suggests people with the most corporate knowledge are wary about markets.

title: US Equity Futures Slide as Chip Selloff Prompts Sector Rotation
summary: US equity futures fell as a selloff in semiconductor stocks gathered steam, pushing investors to look for alternatives in other corners of the market.

title: Amundi Wants Oil, Gas in EU’s New Energy-Transition Fund Class
summary: Amundi SA wants the European Union to free asset managers to add oil and gas exposures to a new fund category intended to support the transition to a lower-carbon economy.

title: Zepto Is Said to Face Sharply Lower Valuation for India IPO
summary: Indian fast-delivery company Zepto Ltd. is seeking a valuation in an initial public offering sharply below its $7 billion peak as concerns over cash burn temper optimism around the industry and raise questions about the firm’s path to profitability.

title: UBS AM’s Zhao Sours on Treasuries as US Growth Outpaces Europe
summary: UBS Asset Management’s Kevin Zhao is planning to short Treasuries in a bet that the robust US economy will erode the haven appeal of owning government debt.

title: Nasdaq 100 Futures Tumble 2% as Chip Rout Deepens: Markets Wrap
summary: Nasdaq 100 futures tumbled 2% as the global selloff in chipmakers gathered pace, with traders rushing to exit positions in stocks that had fueled this year’s rally but whose valuations grew increasingly demanding.

title: Why Fed Independence Is Hanging by a Thread
summary: Last August, President Trump made the unprecedented choice of moving to fire Fed governor Lisa Cook. The administration claimed she was being terminated with cause, citing an ongoing investigation in alleged mortgage fraud committed by Cook. The legal battle between Cook and the administration has been tangled in the courts for the last year, eventually reaching the Supreme Court. title: Chip Stock Rout Deepens as TSMC Selloff Drives Taiwan Correction
summary: Taiwan stocks fell into a technical correction, amid broad losses in Asia’s chip sector as Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co.’s results stoked worries over heavy spending and a weaker outlook for profitability.

title: Paschi Casts Doubts On Intesa Bid, Urges Studying BPM Plan
summary: Banca Monte dei Paschi di Siena SpA expressed a number of concerns over a takeover bid by Intesa Sanpaolo SpA while highlighting perceived benefits in a broad, rival pitch presented by Banco BPM SpA.

title: Abu Dhabi’s ADIC Hires BlackRock Veteran to Lead Real Assets
summary: The Abu Dhabi Investment Council has hired a former BlackRock Inc. and Macquarie Group executive to lead its real assets business, underscoring the emirate’s ability to attract senior global investment talent despite the regional conflict.

title: Amundi to Book €300 Million Gain From IPO of Indian Venture
summary: Amundi SA says it expects to book net capital gain of around €300 million ($343 million) from the initial public offering of its asset management joint venture in India.

title: MSCI EM Index Heads for Correction as Chip Selloff Jolts Markets
summary: Emerging-market equities slumped, with a key gauge headed for a technical correction as mounting concerns over stretched AI valuations triggered a selloff in chip stocks across Asia.

title: UBS, Deutsche Bank Raise Stoxx 600 Targets as European Stocks Rally
summary: Accelerating earnings growth and confidence the rally can withstand the latest geopolitical jitters means strategists are increasingly optimistic about European stocks, a Bloomberg survey shows.

title: Philippine Bourse Seeks to Boost Retail Trading With New Reforms
summary: The sole stock exchange in the Philippines is preparing a slew of measures including new exchange-traded funds to attract retail investors away from online gambling and cryptocurrency trading.

title: Manipal Hospitals Said to Cut Valuation to $8.3 Billion in IPO
summary: India’s Manipal Health Enterprises Ltd., operator of the Manipal Hospitals chain, is seeking a lower valuation of about 800 billion rupees ($8.3 billion) in its planned initial public offering, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: China Chip Stock Pullback Drives Investor Fear to Record High
summary: A measure of investor sentiment on China technology hardware is flashing its most bearish reading ever as the red-hot rally in chip stocks rapidly cools.

title: Michael Burry Says Good Time to Chase Hong Kong Stock Bargains
summary: Michael Burry, the investor made famous in The Big Short, recommends bargain hunting in Hong Kong’s stock market after it lagged peers during the global AI rally this year.

title: Palm Oil Heads for Weekly Gain on India Demand, Biofuel Outlook
summary: Palm oil headed for a second weekly advance on expectations for stronger demand from India, and a lift from higher crude prices.
